commit.subject: LU-15135 lnet: Add defines for state of routing
commit.message:
LU-15135 lnet: Add defines for state of routing

Add defines for state of routing. Update sanity/215 to handle the new
states.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-12556
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I9c5260511a5a69bdcb858238d7801789b4a5fe9b

Reviewed-by: Frank Sehr <fsehr@whamcloud.com>
